text: Some head would be nice. What? Is it some head would be nice? No, I heard you, but why the fuck would you say that? You ladies want an honest man until you guys always ask for an honest man and when he's honest, you don't want an honest man. You're afraid.

You ladies want an honest man until you guys always ask for an honest man and when he's honest, you don't want an honest man. You're afraid.
